title: GroveConfig core type + explore section demotion + mode->steering rename

plan.objective: Introduce GroveConfig (core/src/config.rs) with an integration Mode enum and optional ExploreConfig sub-section; rename steering Modeâ†’Steering and JSON key modeâ†’steering across core and CLI â€” type/serde/persistence only.
key_changes: CREATE core/src/config.rs: integration Mode enum (mcp|skill|both|mcp-llm|grammars), GroveConfig struct, config_path/load/save/validate methods, unit tests
core/src/explore/config.rs: rename Modeâ†’Steering; ExploreConfig.modeâ†’.steering; RawExploreConfig.modeâ†’.steering; update tests/fixtures
core/src/explore/mod.rs: re-export Steering instead of Mode
core/src/explore/agent.rs: Modeâ†’Steering import and all Mode::/cfg.mode call sites
core/src/explore/steering.rs: Modeâ†’Steering; update system_prompt signature parameter
core/src/lib.rs: add pub mod config; re-export GroveConfig + integration Mode; update explore re-export to Steering
cli/src/config_tui/model.rs: import Steering; cfg.modeâ†’cfg.steering; ExploreConfig literal field modeâ†’steering
cli/src/config_tui/update.rs: grove_core::Mode::Aggressiveâ†’Steering::Aggressive; literal modeâ†’steering
cli/src/mcp.rs: enum_str(&cfg.mode) â†’ enum_str(&cfg.steering)
GroveConfig::save is atomic (temp+rename), creates .grove/; load yields actionable error on missing file
explore section is Option<ExploreConfig> skip_serializing_if is_none â€” absent from output when not set
cargo build warning-clean, clippy -D warnings passes, cargo test green

review_plan.objective: Assessed the GroveConfig type + explore-section demotion + steering modeâ†’steering rename plan for feasibility, completeness, and call-site accuracy.
key_changes: Plan's 9-file modification list is complete and accurate â€” verified every steering-Mode call site via grove callers/grep.
Correctly excludes app.mode (TUI App.mode usize index) in config_tui view.rs/update.rs â€” not the steering enum.
Correctly excludes SessionMeta.mode / s.mode trace-session string field in trace.rs and trace_tui.
ExploreConfig's existing custom Deserialize (config.rs L149) lets GroveConfig embed Option<ExploreConfig> directly, preserving field-named errors.
All 7 ACs map to concrete plan items; 7-test suite covers AC6's six categories plus atomic save/load and missing-file.
ADVISORY: enum variant sketch spells MpcLlm â€” land as McpLlm (on-disk spelling mcp-llm is what is contractual).
ADVISORY: RawGroveConfig should carry version+mode:String+explore:Option<ExploreConfig>; avoid Option<serde_json::Value> which bypasses inner validation.
ADVISORY: consider validate() rejecting version != 1 per AC1's fixed wire shape.
ADVISORY: assert explicitly that a legacy explore 'mode' key fails deserialization (missing steering) â€” correct T01 behaviour, T02 owns migration.
ADVISORY: update model.rs L124 doc comment referencing Mode::LEGAL to Steering::LEGAL.

code_review.objective: Reviewed the GroveConfig core type, explore-section demotion, and steering modeâ†’steering rename against the approved plan and 7 acceptance criteria.
key_changes: All 7 ACs met; verified independently by reading source and re-running the toolchain, not trusting PROGRESS.
config.rs: RawGroveConfig + custom Deserialize preserve field-named enum errors; validate() + TryFrom both reject version != 1.
Atomic save() uses temp config.json.tmp.<pid> + rename with create_dir_all â€” save_load_round_trip_atomic asserts no leftover temp file.
Integration Mode enum kebab-cased (mcp|skill|both|mcp-llm|grammars); variant correctly spelled McpLlm (plan-review advisory heeded).
Steering rename complete across explore/config.rs, mod.rs, agent.rs, steering.rs, lib.rs, cli config_tui + mcp.rs; grep confirms no stray steering-Mode refs.
explore: Option<ExploreConfig> with skip_serializing_if=Option::is_none â€” absent/present tests both pass.
legacy_mode_key_rejected asserts old explore 'mode' key fails deserialization â€” correct T01 boundary (T02 owns migration).
Independent run: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings clean; cargo test 257 passed / 0 failed. PROGRESS evidence authentic.
All three touched core files newline-terminated (AC7).
ADVISORY (non-blocking): model.rs:124 doc comment 'Mode::LEGAL' is stale post-rename, should read 'Steering::LEGAL' â€” cosmetic, no compile/rustdoc impact.

validation.objective: Validate all 7 acceptance criteria for GroveConfig core type, integration Mode enum, explore-section demotion, and modeâ†’steering rename across core and CLI.
key_changes: AC1 PASS: GroveConfig in core/src/config.rs, exported from lib.rs; wire shape {version:1,mode,explore?}; RawGroveConfig raw-wire-shape deserialization; validate/load/atomic-save all present.
AC2 PASS: Mode enum has 5 kebab-case variants (mcp/skill/both/mcp-llm/grammars); LEGAL slice complete; from_name fails fast naming field+legal values; McpLlm spelling correct.
AC3 PASS: Steering rename complete â€” explore/config.rs, mod.rs, agent.rs, steering.rs, lib.rs, config_tui, mcp.rs; fixture JSONs all use 'steering'; no stray Mode refs in explore/CLI.
AC4 PASS: explore field is Option<ExploreConfig> with skip_serializing_if=is_none; all 7 fields round-trip; present/absent tests both pass.
AC5 PASS: config_path returns <root>/.grove/config.json; bad mode yields field-named error; missing file yields actionable steer.
AC6 PASS: All 6 required test categories covered; plus legacy_mode_key_rejected boundary test.
AC7 PASS: 257 tests passed, 0 failed; clippy -D warnings clean; all touched files newline-terminated.
ADVISORY (non-blocking): model.rs:124 doc comment 'Mode::LEGAL' stale â€” cosmetic, no toolchain warning.
REGRESSION: All 257 pre-existing tests green.

approve.objective: Architect sign-off on GroveConfig core type, integration Mode enum, explore-section demotion, and steering modeâ†’steering rename across core and CLI.
key_changes: All 7 acceptance criteria met and independently verified through the pipeline (review-plan, code-review, validation all approved).
Persistence follows the existing serde/serde_json convention; RawGroveConfig + custom Deserialize preserves field-named enum errors, consistent with ExploreConfig's raw-wire pattern.
config_path = <root>/.grove/config.json aligns with the project's .grove/ config layout.
Atomic save (temp config.json.tmp.<pid> + rename + create_dir_all) is the correct durability posture for a user-editable config file.
Steering rename is complete and contained â€” grep/grove confirm no stray steering-Mode refs; integration Mode and TUI Field::Mode focus variant correctly excluded.
Clean T01/T02 boundary: legacy_mode_key_rejected asserts old explore 'mode' key fails deserialization; migration is deferred to T02.
No released surface consumes GroveConfig yet; integration Mode enum is additive â€” no cross-module leakage.
Operational impact: no version bump, no migration, no regeneration, no security scan, no deployment change.
Follow-up: T02 owns legacy modeâ†’steering config migration.
Cosmetic non-blocking: model.rs:124 doc comment 'Mode::LEGAL' is stale, should read 'Steering::LEGAL'.
